results.title: Exclusive: After Jhanak, Sanjeev Seth joins the cast of Star Plus’ Ye Fitoor Tera
results.description: Sanjeev Seth, who has featured in Star Plus shows Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai, Jhanak, will now play a vital role in the channel's newest show, Ye Fitoor Tera, produced by Ved Raj's Story Square Productions. Read this newsbreak here.
